ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie in dollars */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross revenue of the movie in dollars */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., R, PG-13) */,
  "score" REAL /* Average score of the movie (out of 10) */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes or ratings the movie has received */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the movie was produced */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the star of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_id" TEXT /* Rotten Tomatoes ID of the movie */,
  "metacritic_id" TEXT /* Metacritic ID of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "languages" TEXT /* Languages the movie is available in */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Synopsis of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES creatives ("creative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES creatives ("creative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES creatives ("creative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the company is based */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the company website */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Sub-genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creatives" (
  "creative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creative individual */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the creative individual */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the creative individual (e.g., director, star, writer) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the creative individual */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the creative individual */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of origin */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the creative individual */,
  "awards" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the creative individual */,
  "nominations" INTEGER /* Number of nominations received by the creative individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, marketer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the movie */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 10) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "creative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creative individual in the cast */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the creative individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "creative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "creative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creative individual in the crew */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the creative individual in the crew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "creative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that won the award */,
  "creative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creative individual who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_creative_id FOREIGN KEY ("creative_id") REFERENCES creatives ("creative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that received the nomination */,
  "creative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creative individual who received the nomination */,
  "nomination_name" TEXT /* Name of the nomination */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the nomination was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the nomination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_creative_id FOREIGN KEY ("creative_id") REFERENCES creatives ("creative_id")
)
